title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Entry-level analytics role supporting dashboards, SQL reporting, Excel analysis, and Tableau updates for healthcare operations. Ideal for recent graduates with internship, lab, technician, or project experience. 0-2 years of experience preferred.
description_snippet: Entry-level SQL, Excel, Tableau, dashboard support, and reporting.

title: IT Support Specialist
description: Provide desktop support, PC setup, troubleshooting, ticket resolution, and basic scripting support for internal teams. Great fit for candidates with PC technician, help desk, or lab support experience. Open to 0-2 years of experience.
description_snippet: Desktop support, troubleshooting, PC setup, and help desk work.

title: Operations Coordinator
description: Coordinate reporting, spreadsheets, status updates, and process tracking across warehouse and customer teams. Early-career role with room to grow into business operations or analytics. 1-2 years of experience or internship background welcome.
description_snippet: Coordinator role with reporting, spreadsheets, status updates, and process tracking.

title: Technical Support Analyst
description: Support customer issues, document bugs, reproduce problems, and work with engineering using Jira, SQL, and troubleshooting skills. Entry-level friendly for grads with strong communication and technical curiosity. Looking for 0-2 years of experience.
description_snippet: Technical support, bug reproduction, Jira, SQL, and troubleshooting.

title: QA Analyst I
description: Entry-level QA role validating workflows, documenting issues, and checking product releases. Good launch point for candidates with structured troubleshooting, analyst thinking, or technician experience. 0-2 years of experience is the target range.
description_snippet: QA testing, issue documentation, and release validation for early-career candidates.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description: Help customers resolve account issues, document cases in CRM tools, and escalate technical problems. Strong communication, organization, and basic technical troubleshooting required. Best fit for 0-2 years of experience.
description_snippet: Customer support, CRM documentation, and technical issue escalation.

title: Business Systems Analyst
description: Support internal reporting, requirements gathering, and spreadsheet-based analysis for business teams. Open to early-career applicants with project work, lab analysis, or technical support backgrounds. 1-2 years of experience preferred.
description_snippet: Requirements support, reporting, and spreadsheet analysis for business teams.

title: Software Support Technician
description: Provide software onboarding support, troubleshoot user issues, log incidents, and assist with internal documentation. Great fit for recent graduates with PC technician or campus IT experience. Employer is targeting 0-2 years of experience.
description_snippet: Software onboarding, user troubleshooting, incident logging, and documentation.
